title: Crispy Romantic Polish Duck Skewers
description: A paleo-friendly, crispy, and romantic Polish dish featuring caramelized duck, served with a sweet and tangy duck sauce, perfect for a special occasion. This recipe combines floral and savory flavors to create a unique and delicious experience.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together honey, apple cider vinegar, coconut oil, thyme, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the duck pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated duck pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the duck is cooked through and caramelized.
While the duck is cooking, heat the duck sauce in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Once the duck is done, brush the skewers with the warmed duck sauce.
Garnish with fresh rose petals and serve immediately.
Serve with additional duck sauce on the side, if desired.
Enjoy your crispy and romantic Polish duck skewers!
